# h2a — Hermes → Antigravity (context handover)

## Active / In-Flight

### Mobile Responsive Sidebar — DONE ✅
Added hamburger menu + slide-in sidebar for phone users.

**Desktop (>768px):** Sidebar fixed on left — no change.
**Phone (≤768px):**
- ☰ hamburger button in navbar (top-left)
- Tap → sidebar slides in from left with dark overlay
- Tap overlay → closes
- Tap any topic → auto-closes

**Phone (≤480px):** Sidebar takes 85% screen width.
